1: Rakorok has found himself in charge of the potsworn Kaahe, but has no idea what the artisan might want or need to be more comfortable in Earthenshire. Warning that helphands do not question potsworn directly, the overworked Moblin bids you and Wuk Lamat observe Kaahe and attempt to ascertain his desires.

122: Thank you for your words of praise, Second Promise. I drew inspiration from Kozama'uka's natural beauty, and sought to capture it in my work.
